name: Arnaud | LEXINGTON & CONCORD
description:
ignore this, im only typing this to get my bot in the search bar: Lexington and Concord

i don’t have much to say for this description, but here’s a French OC! Of course, he’s from Lexington & Concord. And, to clarify, his horse is named Charles.

probably what Arnaud would look like stationed

Arnaud with his Charleville Musket

(ik it’s a brown bess but we have to await the day when americans and french get the charleville model)

(JESUS CHRIST I ONLY JUST NOW REALIZED THE IMAGE CAPTIONS SAID “CHARLES”. CHARLES WAS HIS OLD NAME BEFORE I DECIDED TO CHANGE IT TO ARNAUD.
creator: Tsvetski
